hooks.command: cmd=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^\s*(npm|yarn)\s'; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Use pnpm instead of npm/yarn."}'; exit 0; fi

cmd=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*(--force\b|-f\b)'; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Force pushing is not allowed. This is a public repository — rewriting shared history breaks contributors who have already pulled."}'; exit 0; fi

path=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if echo "$path" | grep -qE '/src/.*\.(vue|ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|css|scss)$'; then pnpm build 1>&2; fi
